subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Thou art All-Knowing, All-Wise and All-Seeing, aware that not for a moment do I cease to remember Thy loved ones, nor am I without mention [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خداوند تو آگاهی و دانا و بینا که آنی فراغت از یاد یارانت ندارم و بدون ذکر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
